<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Replace shared repository credentials"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v1beta1/shared/repo-credentials/{repo-credentials}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Replace shared repository credentials. All fields are replaced.
Returns a heavily redacted Kubernetes Secret resource.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
